mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_SYS_SEQ AS deploySysSeq ,DEPLOY_RESULT_CD AS deployResultCd ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYSYSDT WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
order by INTRFC_ID ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYSYSDT WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

SELECT A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,A.DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,A.DEPLOY_SYS_SEQ AS deploySysSeq ,B.DEPLOY_SYS_URL AS deployUrl ,A.DEPLOY_RESULT_CD AS deployResultCd ,B.DEPLOY_SYS_NM AS deploySysNm FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYSYSDT A inner join TBDEPOLYSYSBS B on A.DEPLOY_SYS_CD = B.DEPLOY_SYS_CD WHERE A.INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBINTRFCDEPLOYSYSDT WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
